Closes #[issue number]

## TDD Checklist
- [ ] Tests written BEFORE implementation (red → green)
- [ ] All new functions have at least one test
- [ ] Edge cases covered
- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes locally
- [ ] Coverage did not decrease

- [ ] All CI checks pass (confirmed in PR checks below)
